FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface IPlatformPopupWindow

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.dll

A borderless, non-activating top-level popup surface (the PAL seam for WinUI windowed popups / E4 out-of-bounds flyouts; later the substrate for E10 tear-out windows). The host owns rendering into it (its own swapchain on Handle); the popup never owns engine state. All bounds are physical virtual-screen px.

public interface IPlatformPopupWindow : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Properties

BoundsPx

Last bounds set via SetBoundsPx(in RectF) (physical virtual-screen px).

RectF BoundsPx { get; }

Property Value

RectF

Handle 

NativeHandle Handle { get; }

Property Value

NativeHandle

IsShown

Visible (a Show() not yet followed by Hide()/Dispose()).

bool IsShown { get; }

Property Value

bool

Methods

Hide() 

void Hide()

SetBoundsPx(in RectF)

Move/size the popup (physical virtual-screen px) WITHOUT activating it.

void SetBoundsPx(in RectF px)

Parameters

px RectF

Show()

Show without activating (Win32 SW_SHOWNOACTIVATE) — focus stays on the owner window.

void Show()
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
